program_descriptions.bathroom: A full bathroom with toilet, sink, and shower or tub.
program_descriptions.kitchen: A kitchen for food preparation; sometimes open to living.
program_descriptions.living: A shared living area for relaxation, entertaining, or shared activities.
program_descriptions.foyer: An entry vestibule or small hallway near the front door.
program_descriptions.extra: A small storage or utility room (closet-sized, typically 0.4–2 m²).

unsupported_concepts: dedicated studio or office program (no separate workspace)
dining room (kitchen and living are typically open-plan)
dataset_notes: Targeted at young singles, couples, students sharing, and young professionals
Studios are open-plan; the bedroom is part of the living area
Storage is represented by the 'extra' program when present
The 'foyer' program represents both entry vestibules and short circulation hallways
